transcript.clean_text: the grand finale of the uae tour destination jabel hafeet and with temperatures around 31 celsius this was always going to be a hot day both in terms of the action and indeed the atmospherics al jahili fought our starting point and then flatlands until we got to the second of the intermediate sprints which would announce the climb itself a test that would define not only today but of course the race itself our champion in waiting but who would it be teleporter leading the race by a modest margin adam yates favorite to take it to it they've duked it out on the final test in the past would it be a repeat of that well what wouldn't be repeated was gas prom in the breakaway they've defined every single one of the brakes with dimitri struck off already secure in black others took up the task seven of them in fact it'd be from israel premier tech we had smoko from quick step alpha vinyl group armor francis joe with clem on davey kaden groves from bike exchange bremersch the classics man from alps in phoenix schwarzman from lotte siddal and team dsm sending neu house up the road as well other pelicans amusing themselves casting beadons towards the cameramen and then when we got to the climb through that secondary sprint and all of a sudden it all started to break down last man standing from the breakaway would be gianni vermeers others with some technical issues at exactly the wrong moment and i'm afraid ruben guerrero was one of those for ef education easy post he was to get himself back in as vermice was indeed pushing on but so were the main contenders the gc men led of course by ua team emirates and a few others borrow hands grow doing their turn patrick conrad was working so hard on the day india's grenadiers they had plenty of spare legs as well but slowly but surely they would be worn out on this mighty test just over nine kilometers to go and some of the incline percentages here nudging 11 and conrad it was that that tagged the last of the breakaway are they pushed on conrad of course working for alexander vlassoff trying to offer him a bit of respite jai hindley who was so good as well on jebel jace was also in the mix but it was that the grind started to have a huge cost most of the action was being instigated by uae team emirates strength in depth not least rapha mica who's putting on the hurt adam yates didn't want to get bullied and after he'd burnt his own teammates out he did not in any way want to be bullied by teleporcatch's men pikachu himself was the one that set off in hot pursuit leaving everyone else for the minor places well bilbao had other ideas bahrain victorious he pushed on and in so doing was just dragging yao al-maidah sporting the young riders jersey on behalf of talib our race leader so a free ride almost for almeida all the way to the back wheel of gates and pagacio how would this resolve well almeida it was that sped on forcing adam yates to chase pagacha was staying on the back wheel of yates and bilbao was starting to fade it was a hell of a battle with just under two kilometers to go and always it seems we get a sprint finish whenever pogaccia and yates are involved it seems to be between the pair of them and so it was today amada had done his job to offer up a little bit of assistance to bulgarcha who sat on yates's wheel meanwhile bilbao was there spectating as these two duked it out yet again on the twisty entry to the final line yates shaking his head saying come on give me a turn absolutely not said talapakacha all thought bubbles of course but actions speak louder than words and teleport catcher was coming through to take not only another stage win but of course the title he won on jabba jais he did the same here on jabal hafiz and in the end it was smiles between yates and pogaca two great warriors fighting here bogacacho a worthy champion and for the home team ua team emirates this was a joyful moment great battle super to see and the exchange of respect and the smiles were equally met dada picacha a worthy champion adam yates a worthy adversary that was the billing and they stood up to that and provided one heck of a show jabber half feet never disappoints neither does tally pikachu it seems deliberate chip just with a second advantage on the stage over adam yates payover bout in third ahead of our maida lucas platt brilliant work by the young australian ahead of varola rafa maiku did so much work as well well our podium dominated by talipakacha but all credit as well to payo bilbao and adam yates for putting on one heck of a show no beating bugatti though 22 seconds advantage in the end and it spun out after that the top five blanketed by 55 seconds before the times really fell away an amazing race a great champion seven days of pure action in the desert with the finale on jab or half eat it doesn't get much better
